citation: Decree No. 15/2018/ND-CP — Articles 19–21 (Advertising and permitted health claims for functional foods)
summary: Functional food (TPCN) advertising may only use MOH-permitted claims and must not imply disease treatment, cure, or prevention.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Vitamin, herbal, nutraceutical, or TPCN health benefit claims. ACTION: WARN — verify against MOH permitted claim list and product registration. CHECK: TPCN declaration number, approved label claims, and dosage. ESCALATE IF: Disease treatment, cure, or medicinal effect implied.
